nodes.name: Write Fix Run

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ tenant: $json.__tenant, run_date: $json.__run_date, fixes_generated: $json.__count_generated, fixes_draft_pending: $json.__count_draft_pending, fixes_skipped: ($json.__skipped || 0), status: ($json.__run_ok ? "complete" : "no_data"), source_facts: { latest_run_date: $json.__latest_run_date, dropped_human: ($json.__dropped_human || 0), llm_drafted: ($json.__llm_drafted || 0) } }) }}
